item.name: Create a service listing as provider

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Electrical repair and home wiring",
  "category_id": 1,
  "description": "I provide safe electrical repair, wiring checks, fan installation, and emergency home repair support.",
  "pricing_type": "fixed",
  "price": "800.00",
  "location": "Dhaka",
  "tag_ids": [1, 6],
  "is_active": true
}

{
  "title": "Electrical repair and home wiring",
  "category_id": {{category_id}},
  "description": "I provide safe electrical repair, wiring checks, fan installation, and emergency home repair support.",
  "pricing_type": "fixed",
  "price": "800.00",
  "location": "Dhaka",
  "tag_ids": [{{tag_id}}],
  "is_active": true
}

{
  "title": "Need a plumber for kitchen sink repair",
  "description": "My kitchen sink is leaking and I need someone available this week.",
  "category": "{{category_id}}",
  "budget_min": "500.00",
  "budget_max": "1500.00",
  "deadline": "2026-12-31"
}

exec: pm.expect(json.title).to.eql("Need a plumber for kitchen sink repair");
